GENERAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Treasure Trove
[Under Section 5(A) of the Indian Treasure Trove Act, 1878.]
(Roc/I1/47356/2012.)
No. VI(1)/171/2014.
It is hereby notified u/s 5(A) of the Indian Treasure Trove Act 1878 that the under mentioned Treasure was found
in Private Patta Land S.No.57-1A1A in Keela Tiruchendur (V) Ganesapuram in Tiruchendur Taluk, Thoothukudi District.

(Damaged)
The persons claiming the  whole Treasure or part there of are hereby requested to appear in person or by duly
authorized agent before Personal Assistant to Collector (General), Thoothukudi District at Taluk Office Tiruchendur on
26-5-2014 at 11.00 AM. If the claimant fails to prove with documentary evidence on that date as required, it will be
construed as unclaimed and the Treasure will be for featured to Government u/s. 6 of the Indian Treasure Trove Act,
1878.

DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIES AND COMMERCE
Final Closing and Cancellation of Registration of certain Co-operative Society.
Ind No. 8. The Chennai Managara Minority Auto Drivers Industrial Co-operative Society Ltd.
(L.F. 1111/ICA/2005.)
No. VI(1)/172/2014.
"In the circumstances stated by the Deputy Director of Industries and Commerce (Industrial
Co-operatives) / Official Liquidator of the Chennai Managara Minority Auto Drivers Industrial Co-operative Society Ltd.,
IND No. 8, in his final closure proposals dated 27-3-2014 and in exercise of the powers delegated under Section 140(1)
of Tamil Nadu Co-operative Societies Act, 1983, the registration of the Chennai Managara Minority Auto Drivers Industrial
Co-operative Society Ltd., IND No. 8 has been ordered to be cancelled and the affairs have been finally closed with effect
from 10-4-2014 vide the Principal Secretary/Industries Commissioner and Director of Industries & Commerce and
Registrar of Industrial co-operatives Procds. No. LF.1111/ICA/2005. "dated 10-4-2014."
Chennai-28,
SWARAN SINGH,
10th April 2014.
Principal Secretary/Industries Commissioner
and Director of Industries and Commerce and
Registrar of Industrial Co-operatives.
JUDICIAL  NOTIFICATIONS
DESTRUCTION OF RECORDS IN THE OFFICE OF THE CITY CIVIL COURT, CHENNAI.
(Dis. No. 4639/2014/R.K. I)
No. VI(1)/173/2014.
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I records
framed by High Court of judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the Volume I of the Civil
Rules of Practice and circular orders, all documents produced by them and files as exhibits in the original suits and
connected appeals, original petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule hereto
and all other documents which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the Original Suits.
Applications and Original Petitions mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of
publication.

GENERAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Variations to the Approved Master Plan for the  Gummidipoondi Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No.130/2013/GLPA)
No.VI(1)/174/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning Act, 1971
(Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972), Government in the order G.O.(2D) 88, Housing and Urban Development [UD 4(1)] Department dated
6-9-2013 & G.O.(2D) 90, Housing and Urban Development UD 4(1) Department, dated11-9-2013 has permitted to change of land
use of a survey numbers making the following variation to the Master Plan for the Gummidipoondi Local Planning Area, approved
under the said Act and published in the Housing and Urban Development Department Notification No.II(2)/HOU/610/2000,
dated 7-6-2000, at page No. 295 of Part-II, Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette, dated 7th June 2000.
VARIATIONS.
In the said Master Plan, in the “Land Use Schedule” of Village Number 236 Peddikuppam, under the heading.:-
IV.
Educational Use Zone, the Survey Numbers, the expression “289A/3” shall be deleted.
And under the heading III. Industrial Use Zone, sub-heading III (b) General Industrial Use Zone the Survey Numbers “289A/3A,
3B, 4” shall be added after the expression “277A”.
Chengalpattu,
S. DHANARASU,
22nd April 2014.
Member-Secretary (in-Charge),
Gummidipoondi Local Planning Authority.
Variations to the Approved Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No. 2507/2012/LPA-3)
No.VI(1)/175/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning Act, 1971
(Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972), and in exercise of powers conferred by the G.O. Ms. No. 94 Housing and Urban Development [UD4(1)]
Department dated 12-6-2009 which has been published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette No. 27, part II, Section 2, page
No. 228, dated 15-7-2009 the following variations are made to the Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area, approved
under the said Act and published in the Housing and Urban Development Department Notification
No. II(2)/HOU/4377/94, at Page 1078 of Part-II, Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette, dated 9th November 1994.
VARIATIONS.
In the said Master Plan, in the “Land Use Schedule” under the heading “Coimbatore Local Planning Area (Coimbatore
Corporation Area)” under the sub-heading  (a) Notified D.D. Plan Area Saravanampatti D.D. Plan No. 6.
(i) Against the entry, “Industrial” for the expression “199, 200, 201, 205pt, 206” the expression “199, 200, 201,205pt, 206”
(except 199/1A, 200, 201, 205/2, 206)” shall be substituted.
(ii)
Against the entry “Commercial” the expression “Nil” for the expression “NII” 199/1A, 200, 201,205/2, 206 shall be added.

LATE NOTIFICATIONS :
NOTIFICATIONS BY HEADS OF DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
JUDICIAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Notification regarding the arrangements made by Sessions Judge, Chennai Division, Chennai for attending urgent
Criminal Matters during Summer Recess, 2014.
(Dis. No. 5133/2014/E1)
(R.O.C. No. 104/2014/E1.)
No.VI(1)/179/2014.
1. In exercise of the powers conferred Under Section 10(3) of the Criminal Procedure Code, 1974, the Sessions Judge,
Chennai Division makes the following arrangements for attending Urgent Criminal Work during Summer Recess, 2014
(01-05-2014 to 01-06-2014).
2. Thiru S. Sengottaiyan, B.Sc. B.L. VII Additional Judge, City Civil Court, Chennai will be incharge of Criminal Work during
Summer Recess from 01-05-2014 to 01-06-2014.
3.  The Vacation Sessions Judge will hold Courts on Wednesdays in every week during the vacation for the disposal of
urgent Criminal matters.
4. The Chief Administrative Officer, City Civil and Sessions Court, Chennai will be the Vacation Officer during Summer
Recess, 2014. In his absence, Sherishtadar-I will be the Vacation Officer.
PROCEDURE FOR THE RECEIPT AND DISPOSAL OF URGENT CRIMINAL MATTERS DURING
SUMMER RECESS, 2014.
 5. All urgent applications, Criminal Appeals, etc., shall be received only on Tuesdays upto 2.00 P.M. The matters will be
placed for orders before the Vacation sessions Judge only on Wednesdays during vcation at 10.30 A.M. Applications and other
matters shall not be presented at the residence of the Vacation Sessions Judge.
6. In all Bail Applications, including the applications for Anticipatory Bail, Notice shall be given to the City Public Prosecutor
before filing the papers in Court and necessary endorsements shall be obtained from the City Public Prosecutor.
7. Clear and authenticated typed copies of the Judgments should be filed whenever certified copies are not easily
decipherable.
8. In all cases wherein notices are to be issued sufficient number of copies of memorandum of grounds, petitions and
affidavits shall be filed for service on the City Public Prosecutor as well as the Respondents concerned.
Apr. 30, 2014]
TAMIL NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE
235
266-16-VI-1-F&U


SUMMER RECESS - 2014.
(Dis. No. 5133/2014/E1)
(R.O.C.No.105/2014/E1.)
No.VI(1)/180/2014.
1. Notice is hereby given that the City Civil and sessions Court, Chennai will be closed for the Summer Recess, 2014
for the period from 01-05-2014 to 01-06-2014 (Both days inclusive).
2. Thiru G. Kumanan B.Sc., B.L., IX Assistant Judge, City Civil Court, Chennai will be the Vacation Judge from
01-05-2014 to 15-05-2014.
3. Thirumathi K. Geetha Rani, M.A. M.L., XVII Assistant Judge, City Civil Court, Chennai will be the Vacation Judge from
16-05-2014 to 01-06-2014.
4. The Vacation Judge, will sit in Court on Thursdays  in each week during Vacation to dispose of only urgent matters.
5.  The Chief Administrative Officer, City Civil and Sessions Court, Chennai will be the Vacation Officer during Summer
Recess, 2014. In his absence, Sherishtadar-I will be the Vacation Officer.
6. During Vacation, no Plaints, Appeals Petitions or other papers will be received except urgent Petitions, Plaints and
Appeals. The urgent papers will be received only on Wednesdays every week between the hours 11.00 A.M. to 3.00 P.M.
Under no circumstances Plaints, Appeals, Petitions or other papers will be received by the Office on any other days.
Plaints, Appeals, Petitions or other matters shall not be presented at the residence of the Vacation Judge.
City Civil Court, Chennai-600 104,
N. AUDHINATHAN,
29th April 2014.
Principal Judge.
236
TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE
